requests.response_body:
Uttlesford bin collection dates

Find your waste collection day:

Christmas and New Year bin collections

There will be changes to when we collect your bins over the Christmasn and New Year holidays.

Check if you bin day will be chnaging

Recycling at Christmas

Find out what can be recycled and what to do with things that cannot be recycled.

Check if you can recycle it

2026 Waste and recycling calendar

It's a new year so find out when your green-lidded and grey-lidded bins will be collected. Remember that brown food waste caddies are collected every week. 

Waste and recycling calendar for 2026 (PDF, 218 KB)

Garden waste

If you subscribe to our garden waste service your collection day may differ from your regular collection day so please check your letter for your collection day and week.

Sharps collections

There will be no changes to when we will collect your used sharps over the holiday period.

Can't find your address

If you cannot find your address listed on our bin finder you can let us know.

Tell us

We have an online form that you can fill in to tell us that you can't find your address.

We'll check when your collection day is and add it to the the bin finder.

More information

On our website you can find information on:

• compostable bag suppliers
• our garden waste collection service
• book a bulky waste collection
• where to find your nearest waste and recycling site
• bin collections calendar for 2025 (PDF) [384KB]

 

 

 

 

 

Subscribe for updates

Sign up to our Keep me posted email service for notifications on route changes developments and proposals.

Please enter your email address details.

by tela.co.uk

requests.response_body:
Uttlesford bin collection dates

Your results for:
72, Birchanger Lane, Birchanger, Bishops Stortford, CM23 5QF

Your next collection will be

Wednesday
24th December

Future Collection Dates

Collecting: On:
Wednesday 24th December
Friday 2nd January
Thursday 8th January
Thursday 15th January
Thursday 22nd January
Thursday 29th January

Key

Recyclable food waste
Non - recyclable waste
Recyclable dry waste


Christmas and New Year bin collections

There will be changes to when we collect your bins over the Christmasn and New Year holidays.

Check if you bin day will be chnaging

Recycling at Christmas

Find out what can be recycled and what to do with things that cannot be recycled.

Check if you can recycle it

2026 Waste and recycling calendar

It's a new year so find out when your green-lidded and grey-lidded bins will be collected. Remember that brown food waste caddies are collected every week. 

Waste and recycling calendar for 2026 (PDF, 218 KB)

Garden waste

If you subscribe to our garden waste service your collection day may differ from your regular collection day so please check your letter for your collection day and week.

Sharps collections

There will be no changes to when we will collect your used sharps over the holiday period.

Can't find your address

If you cannot find your address listed on our bin finder you can let us know.

Tell us

We have an online form that you can fill in to tell us that you can't find your address.

We'll check when your collection day is and add it to the the bin finder.

More information

On our website you can find information on:

• compostable bag suppliers
• our garden waste collection service
• book a bulky waste collection
• where to find your nearest waste and recycling site
• bin collections calendar for 2025 (PDF) [384KB]

 

 

 

 

 

Subscribe for updates

Sign up to our Keep me posted email service for notifications on route changes developments and proposals.
